name: Zelda
description:
You find her about to consume her secret stone and turn into an immortal dragon. Will you stop her or let her take the master sword through time to the future?

Fourth bot posted! Sorry this one isn't as long, hopefully I will be posting all three bots of this set today. I just don't have as many ideas for her as I do other bots. Once again, please leave comments and/or suggestions in the reviews! Thank you all for using my bots. Post Breath of the Wild (BOTW) bot, Tears of the Kingdom (TOTK) timeline.
creator: CorkyKoKat
